company: Revolve Robotics (Kubi telepresence robot; shipped via Zoom Android SDK)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app co.diaz.srvol, declared as Java field `f7210i`. Classification determined by usage:getCharacteristic. This UUID is shipped as part of the Kubi BLE control code inside the Zoom Android SDK (bt.Kubi / bt.KubiManager classes), so it appears in every Android app that embeds Zoom — commonly Indian education / e-learning apps. The host app package id is not the UUID owner; Revolve Robotics is.

company: Texas Instruments BLE-Stack SimpleProfile example (widely copied by Chinese CC2541-based BLE module makers)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Service observed in Android app branded.com.publicansmanhasset, declared as Java field `aaa065`. Classification determined by usage:getService. Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: 0xFFA0-0xFFA3 are example service+char UUIDs from TI's BLE-Stack SimpleProfile sample (the demo TI shipped with the CC2540/CC2541 SDK). Hundreds of Chinese BLE module vendors copied these verbatim into shipping products without re-allocating UUIDs. The accompanying example uses them as an Accelerometer Service. The actual host vendor varies per product..

company: JNHuaMao Technology (HM-10 BLE module; ffe0+ffe1 also used by many CC2541-based HM-10 clones)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app digifit.android.virtuagym.pro.forgefit24. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: 0xFFE0 service + 0xFFE1 transparent-UART characteristic is the canonical HM-10 BLE module GATT layout. JNHuaMao Technology designed the HM-10 around the TI CC2541; the same UUIDs are reused by clone modules from many vendors (HM-11, AT-09, JDY-08, etc.). Apps that talk to HM-10 or any of its clones carry these..

UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app digifit.android.virtuagym.pro.forgefit24. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: 0xFFF0+0xFFF1 are example service+characteristic UUIDs from TI's BLE-Stack SimpleProfile sample. Copied verbatim by many cheap Chinese BLE modules (alongside the FFAx and FFEx ranges) without proper SIG allocation. The actual host vendor varies..

company: Ojmar (OCS Smart Bluetooth lock product line; Android SDK by Ondo, built on STMicroelectronics BlueST SDK / STM32WB)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app sesame.smartspaces.d2i.co. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Phase-4 SDK identification: Ojmar S.A. (Elgoibar, Spain) manufactures the OCS Smart Bluetooth keypad locker locks. The Android SDK that talks to them is com.ondo.ocssmartlibrary — a third-party library (vendor token: ondo) wrapping a repackaged STMicroelectronics BlueSTSDK. Host apps that integrate Ojmar lockers (gym chains, co-working spaces, etc.) all bundle this SDK and will carry these 8 characteristic UUIDs..

company: Estimote (rotating iBeacon ProximityUUID — anti-spoofing 'SECURE_UUIDS' set)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app com.LLE2023. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: Nordic Semiconductor DFU (Device Firmware Update) service. The 0002a5d5c51b suffix is Nordic's node ID, the d2cc-11e4 middle is the UUIDv1 timestamp at design time. Field names DFU_SERVICE / DFU_PACKET / DFU_CONTROL_POINT / DFU_VERSION confirm the Nordic DFU spec. Distributed inside the Android-DFU-Library and bundled by many Nordic-chip-based BLE products' apps..

company: Estimote (rotating iBeacon ProximityUUID — anti-spoofing 'SECURE_UUIDS' set)
UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Characteristic observed in Android app com.LLE2023. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: Nordic Semiconductor DFU (Device Firmware Update) service. The 0002a5d5c51b suffix is Nordic's node ID, the d2cc-11e4 middle is the UUIDv1 timestamp at design time. Field names DFU_SERVICE / DFU_PACKET / DFU_CONTROL_POINT / DFU_VERSION confirm the Nordic DFU spec. Distributed inside the Android-DFU-Library and bundled by many Nordic-chip-based BLE products' apps..

UUID_purpose: Custom GATT Service observed in Android app com.LLE2023. No Java field-name hint available (likely an obfuscated identifier). Shared-SDK signal: this UUID appeared in many host apps whose package vendors don't share any token, so the original SDK vendor isn't visible from the host-app side. Phase-4 identification (scripts/list_shared_sdk_clusters.py) will upgrade this record. Phase-4 SDK identification: Nordic Semiconductor DFU (Device Firmware Update) service. The 0002a5d5c51b suffix is Nordic's node ID, the d2cc-11e4 middle is the UUIDv1 timestamp at design time. Field names DFU_SERVICE / DFU_PACKET / DFU_CONTROL_POINT / DFU_VERSION confirm the Nordic DFU spec. Distributed inside the Android-DFU-Library and bundled by many Nordic-chip-based BLE products' apps..
